english translation text:
MAZLOOM-E-KARBALA KI AZADAAR AAGAYITHE MOURNERS OF THE OPPRESSED ONES OF KARBALA HAVE COMEEnglish Transliteration
Mazloom-e-karbala Ki Azadaar Aagayi- THE MOURNERS OF THE OPPRESSED ONES OF KARBALA HAVE COME

THE MOURNERS OF THE OPPRESSED ONES OF KARBALA HAVE COME
Mazloom-e-karbala Ki Azadaar Aagayi- THE MOURNERS OF THE OPPRESSED ONES OF KARBALA HAVE COME

urdu transliteration text:
Zainab Barehna Sar Jo Bazaar Aagayi.
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
ZAINAB (A.S) HAS COME TO THE MARKET PLACE WITHOUT HER VEIL
Mazloom-e-karbala Ki Azadaar Aagayi- THE MOURNERS OF THE OPPRESSED ONES OF KARBALA HAVE COME

urdu transliteration text:
Talwaar Kai Baghair Larun Gi Main Aisi Jang
Khutbai Perhun Gi Aasai Kai Dushman Bhi Hongai Dan
Dekho Hussain Tum Bhi Hamarai Jihad Ko
Zainab Hai Aj Ban Kai Alamdar Aagayi.
I WILL FIGHT SUCH A BATTLE WITHOUT ANY SWORD,
ZAINAB HAS BECOME THE FLAG BEARER TODAY
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I WILL RECITE SUCH A SERMON THAT EVEN THE ENEMIES WILL BE ASTOUNDED,
O HUSSAIN! LOOK AT OUR JIHAD,
Mazloom-e-karbala Ki Azadaar Aagayi- THE MOURNERS OF THE OPPRESSED ONES OF KARBALA HAVE COME

urdu transliteration text:
Zainab Nai Zindagi Main Na Dekhi Koi Khushi
Roti Huwi Woh Shaam Ki Rahon Mai Mer Gayi
Tanha Lahad Main Bhai Ko Ronai Kai Wastai
Sarkaarai Panjetan Ki Woh Gham-Khaar Aagayi.
ZAINAB HAS NOT SEEN ANY HAPPINESS,
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
SHE LEFT THIS WORLD CRYING ON THE STREET OF SHAM,
TO CRY ALONE AT HER BROTHERS GRAVE,
THE MOURNER (A.S) OF THE PANJETAN HAS COME
Mazloom-e-karbala Ki Azadaar Aagayi- THE MOURNERS OF THE OPPRESSED ONES OF KARBALA HAVE COME

urdu transliteration text:
Jis Ki Hayaa Sai Suraj Nai Khud Ko Chupa Liya
Ummat Shaki Nai Qaidi Ussi Ko Bana Liya
Karbobala Kai Dasht Sai Bazaar-e-shaam Main
Chadar Luta Kai Qaafila Salaar Aagayi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
THE ONE FOR WHO'S MODESTY EVEN THE SUN HID ITSELF,
THE ONE WHOM THE UMMAH HAS MADE PRISONER,
FROM THE DESERT OF THE KARBALA TO THE MARKET PLACE OF SHAM,
THE LEADER OF THE CARAVAN HAS COME WITHOUT HER VEIL
Mazloom-e-karbala Ki Azadaar Aagayi- THE MOURNERS OF THE OPPRESSED ONES OF KARBALA HAVE COME

urdu transliteration text:
Mehshar Kai Roz Aayengi Jab Naib E Batool
Tanveer Yeh Kahai Gain Khuda Sai Merai Rasool
Zinda Rakhai Hai Jis Nai Iraadai Hussain Kai
Ya Rab Woh Merai Deen Ki Madad Gaar Aagayi.
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
WHEN THE REPRESENTATIVE OF SYEDA BATOOL (AS) WILL COME ON THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT,
O’ LORD!,  THE PROPHET OF ISLAM WILL SAY,
THE ONE WHO HAS KEPT THE RESOLUTION OF HUSSAIN (A.S),
O’ LORD! THE HELPER OF MY RELIGION HAS COME
Mazloom-e-karbala Ki Azadaar Aagayi- THE MOURNERS OF THE OPPRESSED ONES OF KARBALA HAVE COME
